episodes.title: Sen. Whitehouse to uncover connections between Trump, Russia, and Epstein.
episodes.description:
Trump/Russia
Trump/Epstein
Epstein/Russia

It’s all connected. Senator Whitehouse will take to the Senate Floor to unpack some of the numerous, well-documented connections between these parties.

episodes.title: Whitehouse and Lawrence Discuss "The Most Famous Flying Bedroom Since Epstein's Plane was Grounded."
episodes.description:
March 4 | Following Secretary Noem's oversight hearing in the Senate Judiciary Committee, Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI) joins MS NOW's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell to unpack Noem's numerous lies and deflections.

Sheldon Whitehouse represents Rhode Island in the U.S. Senate, where he champions policies to uphold American leadership in the world, protect our planet in a changing climate, and hold the powerful accountable.

For more from Senator Whitehouse:

episodes.title: Sen. Whitehouse: The Epstein Cover-Up "Could Go Quite Far through the Rest of the MAGA DOJ"
episodes.description:
February 25 | Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI) joins MS NOW's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell to discuss the Trump Department of Justice's cover-up of the Epstein Files.

Sheldon Whitehouse represents Rhode Island in the U.S. Senate, where he champions policies to uphold American leadership in the world, protect our planet in a changing climate, and hold the powerful accountable.
